message:
test(widgets): add 10 hit region integration tests for list, table, scrollbar (bd-iuvb.17.3)

Validates widget hit region encoding contracts: item/row index data,
scrollbar part+position encoding, opt-in via hit_id, multi-widget
coexistence, and render determinism. Fixes scrollbar test to match
actual 2-field (part|track_pos) encoding format.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
